title: New Media and Communication Program Instructional Objectives
content:
New Media and Communication Program Instructional Objectives

Aims of the Department of New Media and Communication

1- The Department of New Media and Communication aims to train professional communicators who are qualified, competent in the field and equipped with modern equipment for the media sector, which has gained new orientations with new communication technologies in the digitalizing world.

2- It is aimed to train communicators with high critical thinking and social sensitivity, who can use what they learn theoretically in practice.

3- In the education given in the Department of New Media and Communication, it is aimed that students will be able to create academic content.

4- Within the scope of the basic mission and vision of the department, it is aimed that students have the knowledge and skills that a communication faculty graduate should have.

5- In the first two years of the Department of New Media and Communication, a solid interdisciplinary theoretical background is created in the field of communication as well as social and cultural issues. In the last two years, it is aimed to have sufficient knowledge, skills and competence in the academic and professional field in the field of new media.

6- The most important priority of the Department of New Media is to train new media professionals who have a command of all areas of new media, can produce effective digital content in line with ethical values, can manage these channels competently and have the qualifications suitable for the needs of the sector.
